title: Science + AI Technology: Tamil Nadu Class 9 — Motion and Forces
subject: Science

questions.text: A Chennai Metro train accelerates from rest to 60 km/h in 30 seconds. What is the acceleration? Which Newton's Law governs the motion?
questions.explanation: u=0, v=60 km/h=16.67 m/s, t=30s. a=(v-u)/t = 16.67/30 = 0.556 m/s². Newton's 2nd Law: F=ma determines the motor force needed. Chennai Metro's traction system calculates this for every departure — your motion equations run mass transit systems!
questions.subject: Science
